evidence_entries.evidence_text: The green chutney ingredient montage with on-screen ingredient labels and the instruction "GRIND IT IN A MIXER" occurs from 27.00s to 37.00s.

Within the montage, the grounded frame analysis identifies the ingredient labels "GINGER & GARLIC", "FRESH CORRIANDER AND MINT LEAVES", and "GREEN CHILLIES", and later shows the instruction "GRIND IT IN A MIXER". The same analysis states the chronological order before the instruction as 1st: "GINGER & GARLIC", 2nd: "FRESH CORRIANDER AND MINT LEAVES", 3rd: "GREEN CHILLIES". It also identifies the 2nd word of "FRESH CORRIANDER AND MINT LEAVES" as "CORRIANDER".

inference_steps.text: The relevant sequence is the green chutney montage that includes ingredient labels followed by the instruction "GRIND IT IN A MIXER".
Before the mixer instruction, the grounded ordered ingredient labels are: 1st "GINGER & GARLIC", 2nd "FRESH CORRIANDER AND MINT LEAVES", 3rd "GREEN CHILLIES".
Therefore, the 2nd ingredient to get ground in the mixer is "FRESH CORRIANDER AND MINT LEAVES".
The 2nd word of "FRESH CORRIANDER AND MINT LEAVES" is "CORRIANDER", whose 1st letter is C.
Among the options, the choice matching the first letter C is "D. C.".

captions.visual: The video begins with a 3D animated logo for 'Rahul Music World' rotating against a white background. The logo features a treble clef and colorful musical notes on a rainbow-colored staff. Below the logo, the text 'A Anjana Rajesh Shinde Production' appears.

attributes: camera_state: The camera is static, focused on the animated logo as it rotates and zooms out.
video_background: The background is a clean, white, reflective surface with a slight vignette effect around the edges.
storyline: This segment serves as the production company's title card, introducing the creators of the video.
shooting_style: This is a 3D animated logo reveal.

captions.visual: A title card appears on a white background, stating 'SPONSORED BY Hakim Masala'. The text 'Hakim' is written in a bold, red, stylized font, with 'Masala' in a smaller, black font below it. The screen then transitions to a white background with animated red and black dots that coalesce into the 'MUMBAI MASALA TANDA' logo.
captions.audio: acoustics: 1) N/A. 2) The upbeat instrumental music continues.
captions.on_screen_text: SPONSORED BY Hakim Masala | Hakim | Masala | MUMBAI MASALA TANDA
attributes: camera_state: The camera is static, centered on the text and logos.

storyline: This segment introduces the sponsor of the recipe, Hakim Masala, and presents the title of the dish to be made.
shooting_style: This is a title card sequence with animated text and logo reveal.

captions.visual: A montage of ingredients for the green chutney is shown. The first shot is a plate with a folded sandwich, ketchup, and green chutney. This dissolves into a shot of fresh spinach, which then dissolves into a close-up of green chillies, ginger, and garlic. Text overlays identify the ingredients: 'FOR GREEN CHUTNEY PALAK', 'GREEN CHILLIES', 'GINGER & GARLIC', and 'FRESH CORIANDER AND MINT LEAVES'. The final shot shows all the herbs on a paper towel with the text 'GRIND IT IN A MIXER'.
captions.audio: acoustics: 1) N/A. 2) The upbeat instrumental music continues.

captions.visual: A person's hands are seen preparing ingredients for a sandwich. On a wooden cutting board, they use a knife to slice a piece of white bread. In the background, several small metal bowls contain prepped ingredients: sliced red tomatoes, sliced cucumbers, chopped red onions, whole green pickles, a green chutney, and a red masala paste.

attributes: camera_state: The camera is positioned in a static, top-down shot, providing a clear view of the entire preparation area.
video_background: The scene is set on a dark, black countertop. The ingredients are neatly arranged in metal bowls, creating a well-organized cooking station.
storyline: The video begins with the initial steps of making a masala sandwich, starting with slicing the bread.
shooting_style: This is a standard, instructional shot with no special effects or transitions.

captions.visual: Following a text overlay that reads 'APPLY GREEN CHUTNEY TO THE BREAD,' the person takes a knife and generously spreads a vibrant green chutney onto the slices of white bread that are on the cutting board. They use a circular motion to ensure the chutney covers the entire surface of the bread.
